text: Last class we followed the coffee, from the farm where it is grown to the cup.
Today we meet the team behind the coffee and say what they are doing now.
I am leading the logistics project.
She is handling the new accounts.
We are launching a new platform.
Rafael is working with the finance team.
Hi Walyson, nice to finally meet you. I am Marina, your counterpart in Geneva. Can you introduce your team in Santos?
Of course. This is Bruno, my supervisor. He is in charge of logistics, and right now he is leading the shipping plan.
Great. And who is handling quality? My team here is reviewing the new contracts this week.
Camila is. She is my teammate in quality, and she is handling the samples from three new origins.
Perfect. I would like to set up a video call next week. Can you reach out to me on Tuesday?
Sounds good. We are launching a traceability platform, so a call is perfect. I am setting up the agenda now.
He is in charge of the logistics department.
She is my teammate, and she is handling the samples.
We are launching a new traceability platform.
I am setting up a call with my counterpart.

Hi, this is Walyson. Let me introduce you to my team here in Santos. We are a small group, but right now everyone is very busy. First, there is Bruno. He is my supervisor, and he is in charge of the whole logistics department. This week he is leading the shipping plan for the European market. Next to him sits Camila. She is my teammate in quality control, and at the moment she is handling the samples from three new origins. In the office next door, Rafael is working with the finance team. He is preparing the quarterly report, and he is also setting up the meetings with the buyers. Finally, we are all working together on one big project: we are launching a new traceability platform for our clients. It is a busy month, but I really enjoy my team.

Hi Walyson, this is Marina, your counterpart at the Geneva office. I am calling to introduce myself before our first meeting. My role here is the same as yours: I am in charge of quality and traceability for the European market. Right now my team is very active. Two analysts are reviewing the new contracts, and our junior buyer is reaching out to roasters in Germany and Italy. This week I am also leading a small project on sustainability reports. I would love to set up a video call next Tuesday so we can compare our systems. Please reach out to me if Tuesday does not work for you. I am really looking forward to working with your team. Talk soon.

First, the manager opens the meeting and introduces the visitor to the team. Next, each colleague says their role and which department they work in. Then they explain what they are working on this week. After that, they set up the next call and assign the new tasks. Finally, the manager thanks everyone and closes the meeting.
He is in charge of the logistics department.
Camila is handling the new samples.
We are launching a new traceability platform.
Our buyer is reaching out to roasters in Germany.
I am setting up a call with my counterpart.
She is my teammate, and she is handling the samples.
